name: Naigai Tec Corporation
summary: Naigai Tec Corporation purchases, imports, exports, and sells pneumatic devices, pneumatic application devices, working machines, electric and electronic devices, and other tools. The company procures and sells mechatronics, including pneumatic equipment, vacuum equipment, drive units, temperature and liquid control equipment, power supply equipment, aluminum frames and FA equipment, environmental and general industrial equipment, logistics and materials handling equipment, and products for semiconductor and liquid crystal industries. It also designs, develops, and manufactures tensile testing machines and durability evaluation machines for rubber materials; sun tracking solar units; creasers and sealing machines; semiconductor manufacturing equipment units, such as prototypes and mass production equipment; aluminum frames structures; labor-saving devices and automated machines; various testing machines for laboratories, universities, and graduate schools; control units for a range of air-related equipment, including drive and vacuum systems; and water-cooled control units. In addition, the company is involved in the assembly and production of liquid crystal exposure apparatus; and creation of assembly procedure manuals and other documents. Further, it provides repair and maintenance services for temperature control equipment, vacuum valves and pumps, and other equipment, as well as semiconductor manufacturing equipment and related machinery. Naigai Tec Corporation was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
